title: Cherry-pick PR #738: fix: open OAuth URL via tauri-plugin-opener on Linux
description:
`shell().open()` doesn't reliably invoke xdg-open on KDE Linux, so the browser never opened during Lichess authentication.
This PR just migrates to `tauri-plugin-opener` as the existing TODO comment suggested.
notes: Upstream files: package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, src-tauri/Cargo.lock, src-tauri/Cargo.toml, src-tauri/capabilities/main.json, src-tauri/src/error.rs, src-tauri/src/main.rs, src-tauri/src/oauth.rs, src-tauri/tauri.conf.json, src/components/common/OpenFolderButton.tsx

in_scope: Port upstream PR #738 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #738 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #738 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #738 fix in running app
